nation: Madawaska Maliseet First Nation New Brunswick
economic_notes: Band operates St. John Valley Gas Bar, Smoke Signal (tobacco), and Madawaska Maliseet Economic Development Corporation. Investment in BeeHigh Vital Elements Inc. (licensed medical marijuana producer) at cost $1,000,000 representing 15.78% ownership. Auditor noted possible impairment of this investment.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified for two reasons: (1) budgeted figures were not prepared in accordance with Canadian public accounting standards; (2) investment in BeeHigh Vital Elements Inc. ($1,000,000) shows indications of impairment but no write-down was recorded. Treaty credit allocated to Band members of $6,248,000 reduces accumulated surplus. Restricted cash includes Trust fund ($10,896), Land Code Reserve ($1,035,353), and Section 95 Housing Reserve ($186,006). Total government transfers calculated as federal operating + federal capital + provincial operating + provincial capital. Management report signed May 8, 2023 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2020 — significant delay in financial reporting.
